mission.title: surrealdb: Feature: GraphQL Server
mission.description: Feature: GraphQL Server. Requested by 17+ users.

steps.title: Check current surrealdb setup
steps.description:
Verify your surrealdb version and configuration:
```bash
surreal version
```
This feature requires a working surrealdb installation.

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Is your feature request related to a problem?

**Note** this is a tracking issue for GraphQL implementation.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Feature: GraphQL Server
steps.description:
Thank you for submitting this pull request! We appreciate you spending the time to work on these changes.

## What is the motivation?

GraphQL is a useful tool with a large ecosystem surrounding it, allowing SurrealDB to integrate with that will ease adoption and increase use cases.

## What does this change do?

This pr adds a new /gql endpoint, which allows proves an autogenerated schema, as well as allowing custom functions to be exposed, then parses, validates and executes graphql

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Feature: GraphQL Server" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:

prerequisites.description: A working surrealdb installation or development environment.
